segments.speaker: AMBER
segments.en: What about my passport?

segments.speaker: WILLIAM
segments.en: Oh yes – they will ask to see that.
segments.zh: 哦，对了——他们会要求查看护照的。

segments.speaker: AMBER
segments.en: OK.

segments.speaker: AMBER
segments.en: Hope not.

segments.speaker: AMBER
segments.en: And they'll have access to jobs which aren't advertised.
segments.zh: 而且他们还能接触到那些没有公开招聘的工作。

segments.speaker: WILLIAM
segments.en: Exactly – most temporary jobs aren't advertised.
segments.zh: 没错——大多数临时工作都不公开招聘。

segments.speaker: AMBER
segments.en: And I expect finding a temporary job this way takes a lot less time – it's much easier than ringing up individual companies.
segments.zh: 而且我觉得通过这种方式找临时工作会快很多——比一家一家公司打电话要容易多了。

segments.speaker: WILLIAM
segments.en: Yes indeed.

segments.speaker: WILLIAM
segments.en: Well I think ...

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Good morning.
segments.zh: 早上好。我叫埃里卡·马修斯，是马修斯岛假日公司的老板，这家公司是我父母创立的。感谢大家来参加这个介绍会，我希望你们能对我们提供的东西感兴趣。我们是一家小型家族企业，相信个性化服务的重要性，所以我们不打算在客户数量上与其他公司竞争。我们做的是依靠我们多年的经验——比几乎任何其他铁路假日公司都要久——来确保我们在少数几个我们非常熟悉的目的地提供完美的假期。

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: My name's Erica Matthews, and I'm the owner of Matthews Island Holidays, a company set up by my parents.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Thank you for coming to this presentation, in which I hope to interest you in what we have to offer.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: We're a small, family-run company, and we believe in the importance of the personal touch, so we don't aim to compete with other companies on the number of customers.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: What we do is build on our many years' experience – more than almost any other rail holiday company – to ensure we provide perfect holidays in a small number of destinations, which we've got to know extremely well.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: I'll start with our six-day Isle of Man holiday.
segments.zh: 我先从我们的六天马恩岛假期开始。这是爱尔兰海中一个迷人的岛屿，南边是威尔士，东边是英格兰，北边是苏格兰，西边是北爱尔兰。我们的假期从希舍姆开始，您的旅行经理会在那里接您，然后您将乘渡轮前往马恩岛。有些人更喜欢从卢顿乘飞机，另一个受欢迎的选择是乘火车到利物浦，然后从那里乘渡轮。

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: This is a fascinating island in the Irish Sea, with Wales to the south, England to the east, Scotland to the north and Northern Ireland to the west.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Our holiday starts in Heysham, where your tour manager will meet you, then you'll travel by ferry to the Isle of Man.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Some people prefer to fly from Luton instead, and another popular option is to go by train to Liverpool and take a ferry from there.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: You have five nights in the hotel, and the price covers five breakfasts and dinners, and lunch on the three days when there are organised trips: day four is free, and most people have lunch in a café or restaurant in Douglas.
segments.zh: 您将在酒店住五晚，价格包含五顿早餐和晚餐，以及在三天有组织旅行时的午餐：第四天是自由活动，大多数人会在道格拉斯的咖啡馆或餐厅吃午餐。

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: The price of the holiday includes the ferry to the Isle of Man, all travel on the island, the hotel, and the meals I've mentioned.
segments.zh: 假期的价格包括前往马恩岛的渡轮、岛上的所有交通、酒店以及我提到的餐食。顺便说一下，我们尽量让预订假期变得简单公平，所以与许多公司不同，无论您是提前六个月预订还是最后一刻预订，价格都是一样的，而且酒店单人间没有附加费。如果您预订后需要更改开始日期，例如因为生病，您可以更改到另一个日期或不同的旅行，只需支付少量行政费用。

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Incidentally, we try to make booking our holidays as simple and fair as possible, so unlike with many companies, the price is the same whether you book six months in advance or at the last minute, and there's no supplement for single rooms in hotels.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: If you make a booking then need to change the start date, for example because of illness, you're welcome to change to an alternative date or a different tour, for a small administrative fee.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: OK, so what does the holiday consist of?
segments.zh: 好的，那么假期包括什么呢？第一天，您将及时到达，参加旅行经理的简短介绍，然后在酒店享用晚餐。餐厅可以俯瞰河流，靠近河流入海口，通常有很多活动在进行。

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Well, on day one you'll arrive in time for a short introduction by your tour manager, followed by dinner in the hotel.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: The dining room looks out at the river, close to where it flows into the harbour, and there's usually plenty of activity going on.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: On day two you'll take the coach to the small town of Peel, on the way calling in at the Tynwald Exhibition.
segments.zh: 第二天，您将乘坐长途汽车前往小镇皮尔，途中会参观廷瓦尔德展览。马恩岛不属于英国，它有自己的

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: The Isle of Man isn't part of the United Kingdom, and it has its own

items.prompt: According to the speaker, the company

pairs.p: a company set up by my parents
pairs.note: 题干说'公司'，原文用'由我父母创立的公司'具体说明，是同一指代。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句开头介绍公司背景，题干问公司情况，直接对应。

items.prompt: Where can customers meet the tour manager before travelling to the Isle of Man?

pairs.note: 原文中'meet you'与题干'meet'对应，'tour manager'完全一致。

pairs.q: before travelling to the Isle of Man
pairs.p: then you'll travel by ferry to the Isle of Man
pairs.note: 题干'before travelling'对应原文中'meet you'之后发生的'travel'，表示先后顺序。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到'tour manager will meet you'在Heysham，然后'travel by ferry to the Isle of Man'，因此题干问的'before travelling'即指在Heysham见面。

items.prompt: How many lunches are included in the price of the holiday?

pairs.note: lunches 和 lunch 是单复数同义替换
included in 与 covers 都表示包含在价格内
答案直接对应 three，即三天有午餐

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到价格包含五顿早餐和晚餐，以及有组织旅行那三天的午餐，因此午餐数量是三天，对应选项A。

items.prompt: Customers have to pay extra for

pairs.note: 题干说'额外付费'，原文说'小额行政费'，意思相同。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句最后提到更改日期需支付小额行政费，对应题干'额外付费'。

items.prompt: Hotel dining room has view of the

pairs.note: view of 和 looks out at 都表示'能看到'，是同义替换。
原文直接出现 river，是原词重现。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问餐厅能看到什么，定位句说'The dining room looks out at the river'，所以答案就是 river。

items.prompt: Tynwald may have been founded in
Company provides a for local transport and heritage sites.
Take the railway train from Douglas to Port Erin
